stimulus: In the Aztec Empire (1428–1521), calpullis ______blank kinship-based neighborhoods that varied in size from a few families to thousands of residents.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is the best answer. The convention being tested is subject-verb agreement. The plural verb "were" agrees in number with the plural subject "calpullis," which are described as plural "kinship-based neighborhoods."

Choice A is incorrect because the singular verb "is" doesn't agree in number with the plural subject "calpullis." Choice C is incorrect because the singular verb "has been" doesn't agree in number with the plural subject "calpullis." Choice D is incorrect because the singular verb "was" doesn't agree in number with the plural subject "calpullis."
